description: Debt contract. No witness signatures. Bahāʾ b. Abū l-Ḥasan al-ʿAṭṭār owes 61.5 dinars to Abū ʿImrān al-Kohen al-Tifʾeret. The sum is to be paid in monthly installments of 5 dinars, beginning on the Muslim New Year = 1 Muḥarram 611 AH = 1 Sivan 1525 Seleucid, which is 13 May 1214 CE, under the reshut of Avraham Maimonides. Goitein's notes identify Abū ʿImrān as Mūsā b. Abū l-Bayān and Bahāʾ as his uncle, but they do not explain why. (Information from Goitein's index cards and Mediterranean Society, 1:464.) EMS. ASE.
description_he: חוזה חוב. בהאא' בן אבו אל-חסן חייב 61.5 דינרים לאבו עמראן הכהן, 5 דינרים לחודש, מאי 1214, בסמכות אברהם מיימוניד.
